entries.name: The Pokered Team
entries.note: None of this would have been possible without them

entries.name: Pan Docs (gbdev)
entries.note: The definitive Game Boy hardware reference -- the sound chip documentation the editor's audio engine is built from

entries.name: Qt Open Source Edition
entries.license: GNU Lesser General Public License (LGPL) version 3
entries.note: Literally powers this app

entries.name: Claude (Anthropic)
entries.note: Helped revive and modernize the project in 2026 -- debugging, testing, and the living project notes

entries.name: ChatGPT (OpenAI)
entries.note: Development and design help, including the in-app status symbol icons, the gym-badge images, the gym leader portraits, and the rival artwork

entries.name: PyBoy
entries.note: A Game Boy emulator we drive from the test suite -- it boots the real game with our save files so the editor can be checked against the console itself, byte for byte. A developer tool only: it is installed separately, run as its own process, and is never linked into or shipped with the editor
entries.license: LGPL-3.0 (dev/test tool, not distributed with this app)

entries.name: JSON Editor Online
entries.note: Huge help in formatting and validating json data

entries.name: Regular Expressions 101
entries.note: Major help in converting data from the Pokered Team to JSON

entries.name: Codepen
entries.note: Huge help in further converting data from the Pokered Team to JSON

entries.name: Quicktype
entries.note: They helped breakdown JSON structure into C++ so much easier!!!

entries.name: Git
entries.note: Powers the projects VCS

entries.name: Docker
entries.note: Containerized Linux build/test environment -- runs the full test suite plus AddressSanitizer/UBSan and coverage, which can't run on the Windows kit

entries.name: Pillow
entries.note: Assembles UI screenshot frames into animated GIFs (scripts/make_gifs.py) -- used manually to add GIFs; the automated screenshot pipeline itself produces still PNGs only

entries.name: Inno Setup
entries.note: Builds the Windows installer in the release pipeline

entries.name: linuxdeploy
entries.note: Bundles the Linux AppImage (with its Qt plugin) in the release pipeline

entries.name: Github
entries.note: Gracously host so many projects free including this one.

entries.name: Android Asset Studio
entries.note: The program icon

entries.note: The program icon
